verdict_reasoning: HSPA5 (BiP) is a canonical ER-lumen HSP70 chaperone. However, it has documented cell-surface appearance under cellular stress conditions (hypoxia, ER stress, oncogenic transformation), where it is recognized as a damage-associated molecular pattern (DAMP) by pattern recognition receptors and is engaged by surface-directed therapeutic antibodies in tumor models. This cell-state-induced surface trafficking qualifies for contextual accessibility.
